calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-15-2002 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Assigned for trial. Judge: Thomas J. Mellon, Jr.; Clerk: Dan MacDuff; Reporter: Leland Batara; Bailiff: Louise Pierotti. Plaintiff appears with counsel, Arnold W. Evje, Esq.; no appearance by or for defendant. Plaintiff is sworn and examined. Plaintiff's Exhibit #1, 3-day Notice, is admitted in evidence and withdrawn by counsel at the conclusion of the hearing. Judgment is awarded for the plaintiff, against the defendant. Judgment signed and filed this date.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-10-2002 Continued To Oct-15-02 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-15-2002 Assigned To Trial Court
